info.title: Velora OTC API (AugustusRFQ)
info.description: Velora OTC API — post and read signed AugustusRFQ orders for fungible-token over-the-counter settlement. Filling and cancelling are on-chain calls to the AugustusRFQ contract, not REST operations.

externalDocs.description: OTC API — overview and integration guide.

post.description: Submit a maker-signed AugustusRFQ order. The server validates the EIP-712 signature and order shape, then stores it and returns the order record with its `orderHash`. Posting is gasless — the maker only signs.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: EVM chain ID the order settles on. Must match the `chainId` in the signed EIP-712 domain.

400.description: Invalid signature or order shape. Documented examples: `InvalidSignature`, `InvalidInput`.

get.summary: Get an OTC order by hash
get.description: Fetch a single order by its `orderHash`, including its current `state` and remaining `fillableBalance`.

parameters.name: orderHash
parameters.description: The order's EIP-712 hash, returned when the order was posted.

get.summary: List orders created by a maker
get.description: List orders where `account` is the maker. Paginated. Filter to OTC orders with `type=P2P`.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by order type. Use `P2P` for OTC orders.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of orders to skip, for pagination.

parameters.name: hideSmallBalances
parameters.description: Omit orders whose remaining fillable balance is negligible.

get.summary: List orders addressed to a taker
get.description: List orders where `account` is the named taker — the orders that address can fill. Paginated. Filter to OTC orders with `type=P2P`.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by order type. Use `P2P` for OTC orders.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of orders to skip, for pagination.

parameters.name: hideSmallBalances
parameters.description: Omit orders whose remaining fillable balance is negligible.

get.description: Return the maker's fillable balance per token — the lesser of the account's balance, its AugustusRFQ allowance, and the amount not already reserved by live orders. Use it to size a new order so it won't be suspended for insufficient balance.

200.description: Map of token address to fillable balance in raw units.

Address.description: EVM address (20 bytes, hex-encoded with `0x` prefix).

ChainId.description: EVM chain ID. AugustusRFQ is deployed on 1 (Mainnet), 10 (Optimism), 56 (BSC), 137 (Polygon), 8453 (Base), 42161 (Arbitrum), 43114 (Avalanche), and 100 (Gnosis). See /resources/chains-and-contracts for per-chain addresses.

TokenAmount.description: Token amount in raw units / wei (no decimal point). Serialized as a string to preserve precision beyond JavaScript Number range.

OrderType.description: `P2P` is a counterparty-restricted OTC order (a named `taker`). `LIMIT` is an open AugustusRFQ order. The OTC API surface is `P2P`.

OrderState.description: Lifecycle state. `SUSPENDED` means the maker's balance or allowance dropped below the order. `FULFILLED` means fully filled.

ErrorCode.description: Documented Velora error code (e.g. `InvalidSignature`, `InvalidInput`, `UnsupportedChain`). The set is open — handle codes you recognize and fall back to a generic path otherwise. See /api-reference/troubleshooting.

example.details: Order signature does not recover to maker

RfqOrderSubmit.description: A maker-signed order, posted as-is. The signed fields plus the maker's signature.

nonceAndMeta.description: uint256 packing the maker in the upper 160 bits and a per-maker nonce in the lower 96 bits.

expiry.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which the order can no longer be filled.

makerAsset.description: Token the maker is selling. Must be an ERC-20 (wrap native ETH first).

takerAsset.description: Token the maker wants in return.

makerAmount.description: Amount of `makerAsset` offered, in raw units.

takerAmount.description: Amount of `takerAsset` requested, in raw units.

maker.description: The maker's wallet address — the order's signer.

taker.description: The named counterparty. Set to a specific address for an OTC (P2P) order; the zero address makes it open.

signature.description: EIP-712 signature over the order. Domain: `name: "AUGUSTUS RFQ"`, `version: "1"`, `chainId`, `verifyingContract: <AugustusRFQ>`.

permitMakerAsset.description: Optional encoded permit for `makerAsset`, to skip a separate approve transaction.

RfqOrderRecord.description: A stored order as returned by the API, including server-tracked balances and state.

orderHash.description: The order's EIP-712 hash — its unique identifier.

makerBalance.description: Min of the maker's balance, allowance, and balance backing this order.

reservedBalance.description: Amount currently reserved by this order.

swappableBalance.description: Amount available to fill right now.

transactionHash.description: Fill or cancellation transaction hash, once settled on-chain.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp the order was last updated.

FillableBalanceResponse.description: Map of lowercase token address to fillable balance in raw units.
